Name: MiniatureGalaxy
Notes: A selectable galaxy model used inside Domes. The galaxy to warp to is specified in the name of the object. The conditions for each galaxy to unlock are specified in the GameEventFlagTable.

Obj_arg0.Name: Galaxy Type
Obj_arg0.Description: What type of galaxy this is. Also specifies the model for the object if the galaxy hasn't been unlocked yet. Boss galaxies use model MiniKoopaGalaxy until cleared at least once.

DemoCast.Description: Can take part in a cutscene.
